title: bromelia arenaria
intro: Bromelia arenaria, also known as the Pineapple Broom-palm or Pineapple Palm, is a species of flowering plant in the bromeliad family, characterized by its upright growth habit and pineapple-like inflorescence. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Bromelia arenaria include relief from digestive issues, improved immune function, and reduced inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing its leaves in hot water or oil, which can be used to create teas, tinctures, or topical creams.
